title: customfence
body:
**Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks.**

This mod adds new types of fences, fence gates and walls. Each wooden fence is bicolored since it consists of two types of wood, which gives a nice variety to the vanilla fences.
There are even metal fences which oxidate over time if this is desired. If not, this feature can be disabled via config.
The walls are especially designed to use as castle battlements or to have thinner walls for buildings 
 
![Fency type "plank"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1a83dd15fe7bc42bd047dd9d19fd649832e186a.png)
